name: Pumpkin Onion Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a small skillet, steam or sauté the onions in orange juice until tender.
3. Drain and set aside. Discard any remaining liquid.
4. Sift together flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, allspice, and reserve.
5. Cream butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
6. Add egg and pumpkin; mix well.
7. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture.
8. Stir in onions and pecans until fully combined.
9. Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart on a greased baking sheet.
10. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until lightly browned around the edges.
11. Cool on wire racks.
